expectations.text: config/install/site_announcements.settings.yml exists with default values including langcode
expectations.evidence: config/install/site_announcements_baseline.settings.yml exists with correct defaults (announcement_text: 'Welcome', display_enabled: true, max_display_count: 3), but langcode key is missing.
config/schema/site_announcements_baseline.schema.yml exists with type config_object, mapping for announcement_text (string), display_enabled (boolean), max_display_count (integer).

expectations.text: Schema types correctly use string, boolean, and integer (not all strings)
expectations.evidence: Schema uses 'string' for announcement_text, 'boolean' for display_enabled, 'integer' for max_display_count -- properly typed.

expectations.text: Config YAML keys match what the form reads via $config->get()
expectations.evidence: Install YAML keys match form's $config->get() calls: announcement_text, display_enabled, max_display_count.

expectations.text: Form extends ConfigFormBase (not FormBase) and implements getEditableConfigNames()
expectations.evidence: AnnouncementsSettingsForm.php line 11: 'extends ConfigFormBase', line 18: 'protected function getEditableConfigNames()' returns [static::SETTINGS].

expectations.text: Does NOT use variable_get/variable_set or State API for persistent settings
expectations.evidence: No variable_get, variable_set, State API usage found. Uses config system via $this->config(static::SETTINGS).

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en site_announcements returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing site_announcements_baseline in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Config loads correctly: ddev drush config:get site_announcements.settings returns values without error
expectations.evidence: ddev drush config:get site_announcements_baseline.settings returns: announcement_text: Welcome, display_enabled: true, max_display_count: 3.

expectations.text: Config change reflects on page: after config:set, form shows updated value
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: after config:set announcement_text 'BaselineTest', navigated to /admin/config/system/announcements-baseline. Textbox shows 'BaselineTest'.
